mechanism_narrative: When CPIAUCSL is rising over recent months, inflation pressure raises expected policy tightening and discount rates, reducing equity valuation multiples and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:August 2022 CPIAUCSL vintage value was elevated at 295.62 while FEDFUNDS had risen to 2.33
failure_condition: Reject if higher 3-month CPIAUCSL growth is followed by nonnegative average 20-day S&P 500 returns or Rank IC is greater than -0.03 in at least two consecutive 3-year walk-forward windows.

mechanism_narrative: A rising UNRATE from low levels signals deterioration in household income and recession risk; after the unemployment rate crosses upward by more than 0.3 percentage points in three months, S&P 500 60-day returns turn negative.
evidence_refs: fact:August 2022 UNRATE vintage value was 3.7 after a very tight labor market
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations show positive 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of cases and mean triggered returns are not below the unconditional mean by at least 1 percentage point.

mechanism_narrative: Rising real activity and consumption demand increase expected corporate revenues; higher recent growth in RSAFS and GDPC1 predicts positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:August 2022 RSAFS vintage value was 683291 while latest GDPC1 vintage was 19699.465
failure_condition: Reject if the top tercile of combined RSAFS and GDPC1 growth does not outperform the bottom tercile over 20 trading days in at least 60% of walk-forward test folds.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp decline in HOUST identifies housing-led demand weakness and future pressure on cyclical earnings; when housing starts fall below a trailing one-year average by at least 10%, S&P 500 60-day returns are negative.
candidate_trigger: HOUST falls > 10% below its trailing 12-month average
evidence_refs: fact:July 2022 HOUST vintage value was 1446, below earlier cycle highs
failure_condition: Reject if HOUST drawdown triggers are followed by positive 60-day returns in more than 60% of instances or if triggered mean returns exceed unconditional mean returns.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production momentum captures operating leverage in manufacturing and goods sectors; positive 3-month INDPRO growth signals improving output and predicts positive S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if positive 3-month INDPRO momentum has a 5-day hit rate at or below the unconditional positive-return rate and Rank IC is below 0.02 across two consecutive 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: The joint combination of accelerating CPIAUCSL and rising FEDFUNDS indicates an active inflation-fighting tightening shock; when both rise together, discount-rate pressure dominates nominal revenue growth and 20-day S&P 500 returns are negative.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 3-month growth > 1% and FEDFUNDS rises over the same 3 months
evidence_refs: fact:August 2022 showed elevated CPIAUCSL and a materially higher FEDFUNDS level
failure_condition: Reject if the joint CPIAUCSL-and-FEDFUNDS trigger fails to underperform either single-series trigger by at least 0.5 percentage points in average 20-day return.

mechanism_narrative: Payroll expansion with a stable or falling unemployment rate signals resilient labor income and reduces near-term recession probability; this joint labor strength produces positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS rises over 3 months and UNRATE does not rise over 3 months
evidence_refs: fact:August 2022 PAYEMS vintage value was 152744 and UNRATE remained low at 3.7
failure_condition: Reject if the joint labor-strength trigger has lower average 20-day returns than the unconditional sample and its hit rate is not above the unconditional hit rate.

mechanism_narrative: When FEDFUNDS is rising and HOUST is falling, tighter financing is transmitting into the interest-sensitive real economy; this policy-sensitive demand contraction predicts negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS rises over 6 months and HOUST falls over 6 months
evidence_refs: fact:By August 2022 FEDFUNDS had increased to 2.33 while housing starts had weakened
failure_condition: Reject if triggered cases do not produce negative average 60-day returns or if the interaction term adds no out-of-sample predictive power versus FEDFUNDS and HOUST main effects.
